headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 We Find Risky
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

raw.headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Investigating and 1 We Find Risky
raw.summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell OTIS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Otis’s shares (currently trading at $77.13) have posted a disappointing 15% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 6.4% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
